tasks.title: 🎯 Welcome to Mission Control
tasks.description:
Your Kanban board is ready!

**Your columns:**
• Backlog → Ideas and upcoming work
• InProgress → Currently being worked on
• in review → Completed, awaiting your approval
• done → Finished and approved

**How to use:**
1. Create tasks in Backlog
2. Drag to InProgress when ready to work
3. I get notified and start working
4. I move to in review when done
5. You review and move to done (or back for fixes)

**NEW: Assignee & Due Dates**
- Assignee: Who's working on it (Luna, Riki, Samuru, Ed)
- Due Date: When it needs to be done

tasks.title: 📋 Revise Sereno Planner Timeline (Early Access March 31)
tasks.description:
Create a feasible timeline for Sereno Planner leading to early access launch on March 31 and full launch end of April.

**Constraints:**
- Ed has a full-time job (juggling this on the side)
- March 31: Early access launch
- April 30: Full launch
- Samuru developing alongside Ed

**Deliverables:**
1. Revised timeline with realistic milestones
2. Task breakdown for Ed + Samuru
3. Pre-launch checklist
4. Early access signup flow plan
5. Code distribution strategy (early access codes)

subtasks.title: Analyze current Sereno state vs goals
Break down tasks for Ed (FT job constraint)
